periods.note: Celtic Gaul — Gallic tribal confederations; Greek colony at Massalia (Marseille)

ethnic_composition.presence: assimilating; Celtic language replaced by Latin within 2-3 centuries

periods.note: Frankish tribal domination begins; Visigoths and Burgundians also hold portions

ethnic_composition.presence: ruling class in multiple kingdoms (Franks, Visigoths, Burgundians)

periods.note: Frankish Kingdom → Carolingian Empire — Clovis to Charlemagne

ethnic_composition.presence: ruling class (Franks); Frankish identity mixed into Gallo-Roman
dominant; Old French emerging from Latin

periods.note: West Frankish Kingdom → Capetian France begins; Viking settlements in Normandy

ethnic_composition.presence: Norse (Normans in Normandy; assimilated to French within a century)
